content.text:
Now I can see the issues. Let me filter for pending (non-closed) issues. From the index.json, the statuses are: "open", "closed", "in_progress". The user said "pending" which I'll interpret as non-closed issues.

Let me compile the list:

1. 001 - support platform holoscan-cuda13-amd64 - open - M - qcap-sdk
2. 003 - VCU Decoder Timestamp Handling Discrepancies - open - M - qcap-sdk
3. 005 - System Hang During Linux Kernel Initialization (Suspected FPGA Interaction) - in_progress - M - sc6f0-dante
4. 006 - Enhanced Recovery Mode via Boot-Time GPIO Interaction (Button Combinations) - open - M - sc6f0-dante
5. 007 - Dante Ultra TX Encoder IP Functionality Issue After ETH0 Up - open - M - sc6f0-dante
6. 008 - Customize Xilinx HDMI TX DRM Linux Driver for FPGA Design - open - M - sc6f0-dante
7. 009 - Integrate Si5391B DCO for Dante RX IP Core on New Board - open - M - sc6f0-dante
8. 010 - Evaluate hardware for SDI RX/TX - open - M - sc6f0-n1-12gsdi
9. 011 - 面板按鈕 GPIO 無作用 - in_progress - M - sc6f0-dante
10. 013 - 插拔 HDMI 或切解析度, Dante ultra 串流會不作用 - in_progress - M - sc6f0-dante
11. 014 - MAC 修改 - open - M - sc6f0-dante
12. 015 - Verify line-in/out using the ALSA driver - open - M - sc6f0-dante
